query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.owner,
  p.location,
  p.contractors
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1020016, 840002)
ORDER BY p.id;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user HWMKhVWm4R1gayY.38561a93bc5c --database 3SMu786VMCWdCnmNSx6pxw --execute 
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.name,
  p.owner,
  p.location,
  p.contractors
FROM projects p
WHERE p.id IN (120006, 120004, 1290005, 1740008, 1380025, 1380014, 1020016, 840002)
ORDER BY p.id;

rows.name: Arrow Energy — Surat Gas Project

rows.name: First Nations Microgrids Program
rows.contractors: [{"confidence": 85, "detail": "supplier: Pacific Energy has a strong track record of winning energy storage and power generation projects in the Northern Territory, including multiple BESS projects for Alice Springs and Darwin-Katherine power systems. (enrichment pass)", "name": "Clough", "status": "Predicted"}]
